description: Represents the AWS FIS account-level safety lever. This is a singleton resource (one per account per region) that controls whether FIS experiments are allowed to run.

Id.description: The ID of the safety lever.
Id.markdownDescription:
The ID of the safety lever.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 64  
Pattern: ^[\S]+$  
Update requires: Replacement

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the safety lever.
Arn.markdownDescription:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the safety lever.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 20  
Maximum Length: 2048  
Pattern: ^[\S]+$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Status.description: The status of the safety lever.
Status.markdownDescription:
The status of the safety lever.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: disengaged | engaged | engaging  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Reason.description: The reason for the current state of the safety lever.
Reason.markdownDescription:
The reason for the current state of the safety lever.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes
